stemHtml: How would 'R14/1500U' be transmitted by the Air Traffic Controller?

options.a: Runway fourteen RVR one thousand five hundred, upward trend.
options.b: Runway one four RVR one thousand five hundred, upward trend.
options.c: Runway one four RVR one thousand five hundred.
options.d: Runway one four RVR one five zero zero, upward trend.
